text-block-1.title: The Web Framework That Powers the Matrix
text-block-1.text:
Apache Sling is the RESTful web framework that brings OSGi and JCR together into a powerful content management platform. It's the interface layer that makes the Matrix accessible through the web.

At its core, Sling follows a simple philosophy: Everything is a Resource. Just as every object in the Matrix has a digital representation, every piece of content in Sling is accessible as a resource with a unique path.

text-block-2.title: Key Principles
text-block-2.text:
• REST-based - Everything accessible via HTTP URLs
  • Content-driven - URL maps directly to JCR content
  • Script resolution - Flexible rendering based on resource type and selectors
  • Resource resolution - Powerful URL-to-content mapping
  • Extensible - Plugin architecture for custom functionality

code-block-1.title: Basic Sling Servlet
